_comment: Drop the chromemcp-playwright entry into your MCP client's config to connect to this project's shared Playwright MCP server. Common locations: ~/.claude.json (Claude Code), .mcp.json in a project root, ~/.cursor/mcp.json (Cursor). Only the inner mcpServers entry needs to be merged into existing files. The /mcp path uses the modern Streamable HTTP transport; older clients can target /sse instead. SUBSTITUTE <TOKEN> with the output of  ./mcp-token  (or cat ~/.config/chromemcp/token).
